mapper.sql: c.contest_id, c.contest_name, c.source_type, c.partner_id, c.category, c.group_levels, c.cover_image, c.description, c.enroll_start_time, c.enroll_end_time, c.event_start_time, c.event_end_time, c.price, c.support_channel_enroll, c.support_points_deduct, c.support_appointment, c.appointment_capacity, c.writeoff_config, c.allow_repeat_appointment, c.cert_rule_json, c.score_rule_json, c.form_template_id, c.aftersale_days, c.audit_status, c.status, c.created_user_id, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, c.del_flag

c.contest_id AS contestId, c.contest_name AS contestName, c.cover_image AS coverImage, c.category AS category, c.price AS price, c.enroll_start_time AS enrollStartTime, c.enroll_end_time AS enrollEndTime, c.status AS status, CASE WHEN NOW() BETWEEN c.enroll_start_time AND c.enroll_end_time THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS enrollOpen, p.partner_name AS partnerName
mapper.select:
select
from jst_contest c where c.contest_id = #{contestId} and c.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into jst_contest ( contest_name, source_type, partner_id, category, group_levels, cover_image, description, enroll_start_time, enroll_end_time, event_start_time, event_end_time, price, support_channel_enroll, support_points_deduct, support_appointment, appointment_capacity, writeoff_config, allow_repeat_appointment, cert_rule_json, score_rule_json, form_template_id, aftersale_days, audit_status, status, created_user_id, create_by, create_time, del_flag ) values ( #{contest.contestName}, #{contest.sourceType}, #{contest.partnerId}, #{contest.category}, #{contest.groupLevels}, #{contest.coverImage}, #{contest.description}, #{contest.enrollStartTime}, #{contest.enrollEndTime}, #{contest.eventStartTime}, #{contest.eventEndTime}, #{contest.price}, #{contest.supportChannelEnroll}, #{contest.supportPointsDeduct}, #{contest.supportAppointment}, #{contest.appointmentCapacity}, #{contest.writeoffConfig}, #{contest.allowRepeatAppointment}, #{contest.certRuleJson}, #{contest.scoreRuleJson}, #{contest.formTemplateId}, #{contest.aftersaleDays}, #{contest.auditStatus}, #{contest.status}, #{contest.createdUserId}, #{contest.createBy}, #{contest.createTime}, #{contest.delFlag} )
mapper.update: update jst_contest set contest_name = #{contest.contestName}, category = #{contest.category}, group_levels = #{contest.groupLevels}, cover_image = #{contest.coverImage}, description = #{contest.description}, enroll_start_time = #{contest.enrollStartTime}, enroll_end_time = #{contest.enrollEndTime}, event_start_time = #{contest.eventStartTime}, event_end_time = #{contest.eventEndTime}, price = #{contest.price}, support_channel_enroll = #{contest.supportChannelEnroll}, support_points_deduct = #{contest.supportPointsDeduct}, support_appointment = #{contest.supportAppointment}, appointment_capacity = #{contest.appointmentCapacity}, writeoff_config = #{contest.writeoffConfig}, allow_repeat_appointment = #{contest.allowRepeatAppointment}, cert_rule_json = #{contest.certRuleJson}, score_rule_json = #{contest.scoreRuleJson}, form_template_id = #{contest.formTemplateId}, aftersale_days = #{contest.aftersaleDays}, update_by = #{contest.updateBy}, update_time = #{contest.updateTime} where contest_id = #{contest.contestId} and audit_status = #{expectedAuditStatus} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select c.contest_id AS contestId, c.contest_name AS contestName, c.source_type AS sourceType, c.partner_id AS partnerId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, c.category AS category, c.group_levels AS groupLevels, c.cover_image AS coverImage, c.description AS description, c.enroll_start_time AS enrollStartTime, c.enroll_end_time AS enrollEndTime, c.event_start_time AS eventStartTime, c.event_end_time AS eventEndTime, c.price AS price, c.support_channel_enroll AS supportChannelEnroll, c.support_points_deduct AS supportPointsDeduct, c.support_appointment AS supportAppointment, c.appointment_capacity AS appointmentCapacity, c.writeoff_config AS writeoffConfig, c.allow_repeat_appointment AS allowRepeatAppointment, c.cert_rule_json AS certRuleJson, c.score_rule_json AS scoreRuleJson, c.form_template_id AS formTemplateId, c.aftersale_days AS aftersaleDays, c.audit_status AS auditStatus, c.status AS status, c.created_user_id AS createdUserId from jst_contest c left join jst_event_partner p on p.partner_id = c.partner_id and p.del_flag = '0' where c.contest_id = #{contestId} and c.del_flag = '0' limit 1

select
from jst_contest c left join jst_event_partner p on p.partner_id = c.partner_id and p.del_flag = '0'
c.del_flag = '0' and c.audit_status = 'online'
and c.category = #{query.category}
and find_in_set(#{query.groupLevel}, c.group_levels)
and c.contest_name like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
order by c.enroll_start_time desc, c.contest_id desc

select c.contest_id AS contestId, c.contest_name AS contestName, c.cover_image AS coverImage, c.category AS category, c.group_levels AS groupLevels, c.description AS description, c.price AS price, c.enroll_start_time AS enrollStartTime, c.enroll_end_time AS enrollEndTime, c.event_start_time AS eventStartTime, c.event_end_time AS eventEndTime, c.status AS status, CASE WHEN NOW() BETWEEN c.enroll_start_time AND c.enroll_end_time THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS enrollOpen, p.partner_name AS partnerName, c.support_channel_enroll AS supportChannelEnroll, c.support_points_deduct AS supportPointsDeduct, c.support_appointment AS supportAppointment, c.appointment_capacity AS appointmentCapacity, c.writeoff_config AS writeoffConfig, c.allow_repeat_appointment AS allowRepeatAppointment, c.cert_rule_json AS certRuleJson, c.score_rule_json AS scoreRuleJson, c.aftersale_days AS aftersaleDays from jst_contest c left join jst_event_partner p on p.partner_id = c.partner_id and p.del_flag = '0' where c.contest_id = #{contestId} and c.del_flag = '0' and c.audit_status = 'online' limit 1

select
from jst_contest c left join jst_event_partner p on p.partner_id = c.partner_id and p.del_flag = '0' where c.del_flag = '0' and c.audit_status = 'online' order by c.create_time desc, c.contest_id desc limit #{limit}

select d.dict_value AS code, d.dict_label AS name, ifnull(t.contest_count, 0) AS count from sys_dict_data d left join ( select category, count(1) AS contest_count from jst_contest where del_flag = '0' and audit_status = 'online' group by category ) t on t.category = d.dict_value where d.dict_type = 'jst_contest_category' and d.status = '0' order by d.dict_sort asc, d.dict_code asc
